title: quercus congesta
intro: Quercus congesta, also known as the Congested Oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The Congested Oak is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Quercus congesta include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Quercus congesta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential and recommended dosages.
